title: echium italicum subsp. altissimum
intro: Echium italicum subsp. altissimum, also known as Italian bugloss or tall Spanish bugloss, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in vitamins, minerals, and polyphenols, making it beneficial for health, with potential benefits including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Echium italicum subsp. altissimum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and capsules.
